purpose: GuideModal is the renderer modal for the in-app documentation Guide. It calls window.electronAPI.listGuide/getGuide, normalizes folder groups, manages loading/error/empty states, renders markdown with the shared renderer, and reuses the commands modal layout so guide docs are browsable inside the desktop app.
gotchas: GuideModal expects listGuide/getGuide on window.electronAPI; browser-only render paths enter missing_api state instead of throwing.
patterns: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.
Modal components compose the shared Modal shell and close via an onClose callback from App-level modal routing.
conventions: Renderer components use .jsx extensions, PascalCase component names, and @ alias imports for src/ui modules.
